output: Completed the batch 4 invalidation audit. No runtime code changes were required: shot creation and duplicate-as-new-generation now use direct cache updates with `includeShots:false`, no `delayMs` usage remains in shot creation handlers, and no `setTimeout`-based invalidation hacks remain. The only runtime `includeShots:true` callers left are the intentional non-creation flows in `useShotGenerationMutations`, `useTimelineCore`, `ShotEditorView`, and `useDeleteActions`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Audit-only batch; no runtime edits were needed. Grep confirms the shot creation runtime now uses `includeShots:false` in `src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCreationPaths.ts` and `src/shared/hooks/shots/useDuplicateAsNewGeneration.ts`, with no `delayMs` usage in shot creation handlers and no `setTimeout`-based invalidation hacks anywhere under `src/`. Remaining runtime `includeShots:true` callers are limited to the intended non-creation flows in `src/shared/hooks/shots/useShotGenerationMutations.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/timeline/useTimelineCore.ts`, `src/tools/travel-between-images/pages/ShotEditorView.tsx`, and `src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotEditor/hooks/actions/useDeleteActions.ts`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The audit is complete: no `delayMs` usage remains in shot creation runtime files, `rg -n "setTimeout\s*\(.*invalidat|setTimeout.*invalidat" src -g '!node_modules'` returns no matches, and the only remaining runtime `includeShots:true` callers are the intentional non-creation flows in `useShotGenerationMutations`, `useTimelineCore`, `ShotEditorView`, and `useDeleteActions`.
